ab: lawkah cimu kahabaag! manaringay ta’ la.
ch: 請起立! 向老師敬禮!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute the teacher!

ab: ca’rux! tubunani i papasibaq!
en: A: Please stand up! Salute!

ab: lawkah su’ papasibaq!
en: B: Hello.

ab: tahunak.
en: A: Please sit down.

ab: tikuw papasibaq mu icimu kisa’ ga, nanuwan san ku nananiqun.
ch: 今天老師要教大家食物的泰雅語怎麼說。
en: Today the teacher is going to teach you how to talk about food.

ab: baqun su’ kayi’ ni papasibaq quw?
en: A: Do you understand what the teacher says?

ab: papasibaq, ini’ mu baqi. pakabalayq su’ kumaal lawwiy cu qutux quw?
ch: B:老師，我不懂。您可以再說一次嗎?
en: B: I don’t understand. Can you repeat it again?

ab: ini’ mu pungi, karahuwal tikay ku kayi’ su’ quw?
ch: B:我聽不到，您講大聲一點好嗎?
en: I can’t hear you, can you speak louder?

ab: kitaal i runi, galgiy kuwing i lumpuw cu qutux.
ch: 請看這裡! 跟著我唸一遍。
en: Look here, please! Repeat after me.

ab: yani! balayq cubalay ku linpuw mamu.
en: Yes! You have read it very well.

ab: lpuw lawwiy cu qutux, karahuwal ku hanaang.
en: Read it again. Please speak louder.

ab: ikiyang! laxi ku sangaquwaq!
en: Please be quiet. Don’t talk.

ab: agal ku ruwas.
en: A: Please take out your textbook.

ab: uwal, papasibaq.
en: B: Yes, sir.

ab: agal ku papateq.
en: A: Please take out your pen.

ab: papasibaq, ungian mu maras ku papateq la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my pen.

ab: agal ku papawng cu pinateq.
en: A: Please take out the eraser.

ab: papasibaq, ungian mu maras ku papawng cu pinateq la.
en: B: I forgot to bring my eraser.

ab: kabawx cuku bays su’ cu papawng cu pinateq.
ch: A:請跟旁邊同學借橡皮擦。
en: A: Please borrow erasers from your classmates.

ab: kabaxay mu ku papawng cu pinateq su’ quw?
en: B: Can I borrow your eraser?

ab: muhungiqay ta’ la.
en: Class is over.

ab: pasikiaw ta’ i runi makibaq han, makitalay ta’ lawwiy i casan.
ch: 我們就先學習到這邊，明天見。
en: Class dismissed, see you tomorrow.
